title: Cherished Orbs!
description: A orb-shaped retexture to Cherished Worlds. Get to favoriting your worlds!
body:
## Main Changes
- Tweaks the favoriting icon. Now with a new shape and cleaner shading!
- Dude, that's literally it.
- There's literally two textures in the mod, lol. 
## Credits
- **Noodleman** : They did EVERYTHING. It took 5 minutes.
- **Crispytwig** : He didn't do anything, but he's cool, I think.
